title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-23
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: The greenhouse got counted
gist.blurb: The garden ledger has been refreshed: app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse notes are back in season.
gist.summary: Updated the automated app metrics, health-check records, and GREENHOUSE.md community app inventory for 2026-07-23.
gist.impact: Maintainers get a current snapshot of the app ecosystem, making it easier to spot healthy blooms and projects that need tending.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as a tiny garden keeper checking labeled code-plants in a greenhouse, with a retro terminal showing tidy app-health charts and a clipboard of metrics. The scene represents a routine census of the community app garden rather than a new product capability.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a warm community app greenhouse, where the cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown stripes, pink rectangular cheek blushes, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener hat checks code-plants with a clipboard while a retro CRT terminal displays simple app-health charts. Lime green (#ecf874) glows prominently from flower pots and the terminal beside mint, lavender, peach, and warm cream plants; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, subtle scanlines, pixel-font text: 'APP METRICS'.
